utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 7 items in the required format: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (selected activities with costs), additional_services (any extra services with costs), total_budget (complete cost breakdown). One notable omission relative to the user task is restaurants, but restaurants are not part of the required format, so it doesn't affect coverage count. Therefore, all 7/7 items are present and sufficiently specified according to the format.
